entity.label: Nobah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: The name given to Kenath (q.v.) by Nobah when he conquered it. It was on the east of Gilead (Judg. 8:11).

nodes.label: Nobah
nodes.description: The name given to Kenath (q.v.) by Nobah when he conquered it. It was on the east of Gilead (Judg. 8:11).

verses.text: And Nobah went and took Kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it Nobah, after his own name.
And Gideon went up by the way of them that dwelt in tents on the east of Nobah and Jogbehah, and smote the host: for the host was secure.
